title: How do we measure software in LLM era?
abstract:
A bit of a rant. Sorry!

With the probablistic pluggable 'brain' existing in parts of the solution how are you measuring anything is better or worse?

I am at a loss to quantify whether anything is improving or worsening anything. It probably is also because of the various metrics that
abstract_zh:
哎呀妈呀，各位！大伙儿都别急，今天我要吐槽个事儿。话说这智能大脑变成了概率性的插件，在解决方案里七零八落的，咱们怎么衡量啥是好啥是坏呢？

想当初，软件还老实巴交的，现在倒好，各种指标五花八门，弄得我一头雾水，连喝杯茶都觉得不踏实了。各位，你们有啥高招吗？！
